title: An Isometric Representation for the Lipschitz-Free Space of Length Spaces Embedded in Finite-Dimensional Spaces
summary: For a domain $Ω$ in a finite-dimensional space $E$, we consider the space $M=(Ω,d)$ where $d$ is the intrinsic distance in $Ω$. We obtain an isometric representation of the space $\mathrm{Lip}_{0}(M)$ as a subspace of $L^{\infty}(Ω;E^{*})$ and we use this representation in order to obtain the corresponding isometric representation for the Lipschitz-free space $\mathcal{F}(M)$ as a quotient of the space $L^{1}(Ω;E)$. We compare our result with those existent in the literature for bounded domains with Lipschitz boundary, and for convex domains, which can be then deduced as a corollaries of our result.
